plan.failureSummary: The automation failed because it could not find the 'Last Name' input field. Comparing the failure screenshot with the attempted selectors reveals that the form structure has changed: the page now displays a 'Your Name' field instead of 'Last Name'. Since the test was running in DETERMINISTIC mode, it was attempting to use stale cached instructions that no longer match the UI.
observedIndicators: Tool 'inputText' failed to resolve the element for 'Last Name'
Failure screenshot shows 'Your Name' label, but no 'Last Name' label exists on the page
Baseline screenshot shows the end state of a successful run, confirming the flow has worked previously
Semantic intent ('Fill out all questions') is flexible enough to handle the rename/change

remediationSteps.details: Clear the Donobu cache and re-run the test. This will force the agent to perform a fresh autonomous crawl and generate new, valid instructions for the updated form.

remediationSteps.summary: Update cached instructions via fresh run.
remediationSteps.details: If deterministic mode is required to be stable across this specific change without frequent cache clears, consider updating the underlying selectors if they were manually defined (though here they appear to be AI-generated).

plan.notes: The objective 'Fill out all of the survey questions' is semantically flexible. Deleting the cache and retrying will allow the autonomous agent to adapt to the new form layout ('Your Name' instead of 'Last Name') and successfully complete the survey.
